name: Brex
description: A unified corporate spend platform offering corporate cards, expense management, payments, travel, and related financial APIs.

auth_methods.note: Docs state support for OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code + PKCE and Client Credentials) and API keys; authorization uses scoped bearer tokens in the Authorization header.

credential_access.note: Getting started docs describe signing up for a developer account and generating API keys in the developer dashboard without manual approval.

api_surface.note: Docs state Brex provides REST APIs described via OpenAPI across many product areas (Accounting, Payments, Expenses, Team, Transactions, Travel, Webhooks, etc.). SDKs are also available.

buildability.note: Public docs + ability to self-generate API keys from the dashboard make integrations possible today. Some product features (e.g., issuing cards, payments) may require a Brex business account but API access itself can be obtained via developer signup.

queries: Brex developer getting started API keys
Brex contact sales partnership API access
